source_pr.title: *: rewrite builtin func in to DNF
source_pr.body:
to #4080 
rewrite `a in (b, c, d)` to
`a = b or a = c or a = d`

PTAL @zz-jason @hanfei1991 @breeswish

symptoms: // sql: "select * from t a where a.c < 10000 and a.d in (1000, a.e) order by a.b limit 2", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)

fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
